member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.Abstractions.IMultiCache
member.summary: A multi cache that allows cache items to be stored in an or a implementation. The cache includes the option to allow internal errors that occur when adding or retrieving items to be masked.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.IDistributedCacheExtensions
member.summary: A set of extension methods for instances to bring things more into line with those available for the .

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.IDistributedCacheExtensions.GetOrCreateString(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Distributed.IDistributedCache,System.String,System.Func{System.String},System.Func{Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Distributed.DistributedCacheEntryOptions},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the string from the cache using the specified or creates the specified string value using the provided delegate if it is not present in the cache.

param.name: throwOnCacheFailure
param.para: Specifies whether or not to throw an exception if the operation to get or set the cache item in the underlying cache fails.

Setting this as false means that the failure is handled silently allowing the new cache item to be built with any cache failures being masked. Any exceptions are then returned by the method as an which has an inner exception of type to be handled manually by the caller.

member.returns: The string that has either been retrieved or added to the cache together with any exception information
member.exception: Thrown when the , , or are null.
Thrown when the is either an empty string or whitespace.

member.summary: Gets the string from the cache using the specified or creates the specified string value using the provided delegate if it is not present in the cache.

param.name: throwOnCacheFailure
param.para: Specifies whether or not to throw an exception if the operation to get or set the cache item in the underlying cache fails.

Setting this as false means that the failure is handled silently allowing the new cache item to be built with any cache failures being masked. Any exceptions are then returned by the method as an which has an inner exception of type to be handled manually by the caller.

member.returns: The string that has either been retrieved or added to the cache together with any exception information
member.exception: Thrown when the , , or are null.
Thrown when the is either an empty string or whitespace.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.MultiCache
member.summary: A multi cache that allows cache items to be stored in an or a implementation. The cache includes the option to allow internal errors that occur when adding or retrieving items to be masked.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.MultiCache.GetAllMemoryCacheMetaEntries
member.summary: Gets all memory cache meta entries.
member.returns: A collection of instances.
member.exception: Meta entries cannot be retrieved when analytics is disabled. or There has been a problem reading the memory cache keys.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.MultiCache.RemoveAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes the item with the specified from the cache.
member.typeparam: The type of the cached item.
member.returns: A task which can be awaited to indicate completion.
member.exception: There has been a problem removing the item with the key: " +

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.MultiCache.ClearMemoryCache
member.summary: Clears the memory cache.
member.exception: There was a problem clearing all items from the memory cache.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.MultiCache.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases unmanaged and - optionally - managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.MultiCache.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.UmbrellaDistributedCacheException
member.summary: Represents errors that occur during operations on an instance during the execution of a method that is part of the type.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.UmbrellaDistributedCacheException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.UmbrellaDistributedCacheException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.UmbrellaDistributedCacheException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if no inner exception is specified.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Caching.UmbrellaDistributedCacheException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The that holds the serialized object data about the exception being thrown.
The that contains contextual information about the source or destination.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Comparers.GenericComparer`2.#ctor(System.Func{`0,`1},System.Func{`0,`0,System.Int32})
member.summary:
Create a new instance of the comparer using the specified delegate to select the value used to check for object instance equality. If a custom comparer is specified then that will be used instead with the property selector only being used to determine the HashCode for an object instance.
If a custom comparer is not specified then equality will be determined by trying to get values from each object using the and comparing those.
member.param: An optional delegate for custom comparison instead of using the if possible.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Comparers.GenericEqualityComparer`2
member.summary: A generic comparer to allow for determining equality between 2 object instances of the same type.
member.typeparam: The type of the object instances to compare.
The type of the property used for comparison.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Comparers.GenericEqualityComparer`2.#ctor(System.Func{`0,`1},System.Func{`0,`0,System.Boolean})
member.summary:
Create a new instance of the comparer using the specified delegate to select the value used to check for object instance equality. If a custom comparer is specified then that will be used instead with the property selector only being used to determine the HashCode for an object instance.
If a custom comparer is not specified then equality will be determined by trying to get values from each object using the and comparing those.
member.param: An optional delegate for custom comparison instead of using the if possible.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Comparers.GenericEqualityComparer`2.Equals(`0,`0)
member.summary: Determines if the 2 provided object instances are equal.
member.returns: Whether or not the 2 object instances are equal.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Comparers.GenericEqualityComparer`2.GetHashCode(`0)
member.summary: Computes the hash code for the specified object instance. Internally this calls GetHashCode on the value that is returned by the propertySelector delegate supplied in the constructor.
member.param: The object instance to compute the hash code for.
member.returns: The hash code

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Compilation.DebugUtility
member.summary: This is an internal class used only for the purposes of debugging the library projects. Exposing this for use outside of these projects would be pointless once the libraries have been compiled in release mode.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Configuration.ReadOnlyAppSettingsBase
member.summary: The base class for an AppSettings class that contains property definitions for settings that are read from the appSettings section of the application config file, e.g. app.config, web.config.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Configuration.ReadOnlyAppSettingsBase`1
member.summary: The base class for an AppSettings class that contains property definitions for settings that are read from
member.typeparam: The type of the application settings source.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.DependencyInjection.LazyProxy`1
member.summary: An extension of the Lazy class indended to support allowing Lazy types to be injected into constructors. Look at to see it's service registration.
member.typeparam: The type that Lazy wraps around.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Abstractions.IEmailSender
member.summary: A service used to send emails.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Abstractions.IEmailSender.SendEmailAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.String)
member.summary: Sends the email to the specified email address.
member.param: The email address of the sender. If this is not specified, the default email address will be automatically set to the default value .
member.returns: An awaitable task which will complete when the email has been sent.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.EmailBuilder.UsingTemplate(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Specify either an email template filename, or supply a raw html string to use instead
member.param: The source template file or raw html to use
Indicates whether the source is a file or raw html

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.EmailSender
member.summary: An implementation of the abstraction that either sends emails using a configured SMTP server or saves them to a folder on disk as .eml files. Configuration is specified using the singleton configured with the application's DI container.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.EmailSender.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Umbrella.Utilities.Email.EmailSender},Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions)
member.summary: Create a new instance.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions
member.summary: The options for the .

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.DeliveryMethod
member.summary: The method of delivery. Defaults to . is not supported.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.DefaultFromAddress
member.summary: The default sender address.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.PickupDirectoryLocation
member.summary: The path to the folder on disk where emails will be saved when is set to .

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.Host
member.summary: The address of the SMTP server.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.Port
member.summary: The port used to connect to the SMTP server. Defaults to 25.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.UserName
member.summary: The username used to connect to the SMTP server.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.Password
member.summary: The password used to connect to the SMTP server.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions.SecureServerConnection
member.summary: Specifies whether or not the SMTP server connection is secured. Defaults to .

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Encryption.Abstractions.INonceGenerator
member.summary: Generates cryptographically strong nonces.

member.summary: Generates a nonce encoded as a base64 string according to the specified length in bytes.
member.returns: A base64 encoded string.

member.summary: Utility to provide string encryption capabilities

member.summary: Finds the cert having thumbprint supplied from store location supplied
member.returns: X509Certificate2

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Encryption.CertificateUtility.FindCertificateByThumbprint(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Finds the cert having thumbprint supplied defaulting to the personal store of currrent user.
member.returns: X509Certificate2

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Encryption.CertificateUtility.ExportCertificateWithPrivateKey(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2,System.String@)
member.summary: Exports the cert supplied into a byte arrays and secures it with a randomly generated password.

member.summary: Initializes the encryption utility with values for the Key and IV.

member.returns: The encryption result.

member.summary: Disposes of the current instance

member.summary: Method to convert a byte array to a unicode string.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Exceptions.UmbrellaException
member.summary: Represents a generic exception thrown from a class in one of the Umbrella libraries. This class serves as the base exception for more specific Umbrella exceptions thrown from other Umbrella libraries.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Exceptions.UmbrellaException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Exceptions.UmbrellaException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Exceptions.UmbrellaException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if no inner exception is specified.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Exceptions.UmbrellaException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The that holds the serialized object data about the exception being thrown.
The that contains contextual information about the source or destination.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions
member.summary: Contains useful DateTime extension methods

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.DateTimeExtensions.ToTimeSinceString(System.DateTime,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the time between the date and the current DateTime according to the following: 1) Under 1 minute - "Just now" 2) Under 1 hour - "xx minute(s) ago" 3) Under 1 day - "xx hour(s) ago" 4) Under 7 days - "xx day(s) ago" 5) >= 7 days - the date according to the specified format
member.param: The format for a DateTime value to be returned in. Defaults to a short date string.
Allows a reference value to be passed. By default this method use DateTime.Now for comparison.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.EnumExtensions
member.summary: A set of extension methods for types.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.HashSetExtensions
member.summary: A set of extension methods for the type.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.HashSetExtensions.AddNotNull``1(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{``0},``0)
member.summary: Adds a value to the specified only if it is not null.
member.typeparam: The type of elements in the .
member.param: The to which the will be added.
The value to be added to the .
member.returns: A indicating whether or not the value had been added to the .

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.HashSetExtensions.AddNotNullTrim(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a string value to the specified only if it is not null. In doing so, the string is also trimmed.
member.typeparam: The type of elements in the .
member.param: The to which the will be added.
The value to be added to the .
member.returns: A indicating whether or not the value had been added to the .

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.HashSetExtensions.AddNotNullTrimToLowerInvariant(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a string value to the specified only if it is not null. In doing do, the string value is trimmed and converted to lowercase using the rules of the invariant culture.
member.typeparam: The type of elements in the .
member.param: The to which the will be added.
The value to be added to the .
member.returns: A indicating whether or not the value had been added to the .

member.returns: The database connection.

member.summary: Splits a collection into groups
member.typeparam: The type of the source collection
member.param: The collection to be split into groups
The number of items per group
member.returns: A nested collection split into groups

member.summary: Extension methods for the enum.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.SortDirectionExtensions.ToSqlSortDirection(Umbrella.Utilities.Sorting.SortDirection)
member.summary: Converts the provided to the corresponding SQL sort direction, i.e. ASC or DESC
member.returns: A string of the corresponding SQL sort direction.

member.summary: Get index of a char

member.summary: Get index of a char starting from a given index

member.summary: Get index of a string

member.summary: Get index of a string from a given index

member.summary: Get index of a string with case option

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.StringBuilderExtensions.IndexOf(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get index of a string from a given index with case option

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.StringExtensions.Contains(System.String,System.String,System.StringComparison)
member.summary: Returns a value indicating whether a specified substring occurs within this string.
member.param: The type of to use to locate the in the .
member.returns: true if the value parameter occurs within this string, otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToPersonNameCase(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to convert the name of a person into some kind of normalized format where the name is not presently in a reasonable format, e.g. riCHARd would be better transformed into Richard. This method only deals with the simplest of cases currently.
member.returns: The normalized name

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.FriendlyUrl.FriendlyUrlGenerator
member.summary: See: https://www.johanbostrom.se/blog/how-to-create-a-url-and-seo-friendly-string-in-csharp-text-to-slug-generator

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.FriendlyUrl.IFriendlyUrlGenerator
member.summary: A utility for generating friendly URLs.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.FriendlyUrl.IFriendlyUrlGenerator.GenerateUrl(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a friendly URL segment.
member.param: The text to use to generate the URL segment.
The maximum length of the genrated URL segment.
member.returns: The URL segment.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard
member.summary: A static helper class that includes various parameter checking routines.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentNotNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws if the given argument is null.
member.exception: The value is null.
member.param: The name of the argument to test.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentNotNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an exception if the tested string argument is null, or an empty string.
member.exception: The string value is null.
The string is empty.
member.param: The name of the argument to test.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentNotNullOrWhiteSpace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an exception if the tested string argument is null, whitespace, or an empty string.
member.exception: The string value is null.
The string is empty or only whitespace.
member.param: The name of the argument to test.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentNotNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an exception if the tested argument is null or empty.
member.exception: The is null.
The is empty.
member.param: The name of the argument to test.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentOfType``1(System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the is of type or a type in it's type hierarchy. Calls internally.
member.param: A custom message which is appended to the default error message.
member.exception: The value is null.
The value is not of type or a type in it's type hierarchy.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentOfTypeExact``1(System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the is axactly of type Calls internally.
member.param: A custom message which is appended to the default error message.
member.exception: The value is null.
The value is not exactly of type

member.summary: Checks if a string is between a minimum and maximum length.
member.exception: The argument is null.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentInRange``1(``0,System.String,System.Nullable{``0},System.Nullable{``0})
member.summary: Checks if a value is within a specified range.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Guard.ArgumentInRange``1(System.Nullable{``0},System.String,System.Nullable{``0},System.Nullable{``0},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Checks if a value is within a specified range.
member.exception: The argument value provided cannot be null.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfo
member.summary: Represents basic metadata of an HTTP resource.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfo.ContentType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the content.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfo.ContentLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the content.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfo.LastModified
member.summary: Gets or sets the last modified date.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfo.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets the URL.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtility
member.summary: A utility class used to get basic details of a resource on a URL.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtility.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the for the specified . Returns null where the resource cannot be found.
member.exception: There was a problem retrieving data for the specified url: {url}

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtility.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases unmanaged and - optionally - managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtility.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtilityOptions
member.summary: The options for the class, typically registered with DI as a singleton.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtilityOptions.CacheEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether caching is enabled. This will override any caching parameters on methods of the class. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtilityOptions.CacheTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the cache timeout. Defaults to 1 hour.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtilityOptions.CacheSlidingExpiration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether sliding expiration is enabled. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.HttpResourceInfoUtilityOptions.UseMemoryCache
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not to cache items in memory or use whatever the chosen distributed caching mechanism is for the application. Defaults to .

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.IHttpResourceInfoUtility
member.summary: A utility class used to get basic details of a resource on a URL.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Http.IHttpResourceInfoUtility.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the for the specified . Returns null where the resource cannot be found.
member.exception: There was a problem retrieving data for the specified url: {url}

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Json.UmbrellaJsonTypeNameHandling
member.summary: Specifies Type Name handling options when serializing / deserializing objects. This enum has been lifted from the Newtonsoft.Json code and is here as part of the abstraction efforts to avoid a hard dependency on Newtonsoft.Json.

member.name: F:Umbrella.Utilities.Json.UmbrellaJsonTypeNameHandling.None
member.summary: Do not include the .NET type name when serializing types.

member.name: F:Umbrella.Utilities.Json.UmbrellaJsonTypeNameHandling.Objects
member.summary: Include the .NET type name when serializing into a JSON object structure.

member.name: F:Umbrella.Utilities.Json.UmbrellaJsonTypeNameHandling.Arrays
member.summary: Include the .NET type name when serializing into a JSON array structure.

member.name: F:Umbrella.Utilities.Json.UmbrellaJsonTypeNameHandling.All
member.summary: Always include the .NET type name when serializing.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Mime.IMimeTypeUtility
member.summary: A utility to lookup MIME Types.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Mime.IMimeTypeUtility.GetMimeType(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the MIME Type of the specified filename or extension. If the extension cannot be identified then the default type of application/octet-stream will be returned.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Mime.MimeTypeUtility
member.summary: A utility to lookup MIME Types.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Mime.MimeTypeUtility.GetMimeType(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the MIME Type of the specified filename or extension. If the extension cannot be identified then the default type of application/octet-stream will be returned.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.Abstractions.IConcurrentRandomGenerator
member.summary: A thread-safe wrapper around the type.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.Abstractions.IConcurrentRandomGenerator.GenerateDistinctCollection(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a unique collection of integers based on the specified and values with a size specified by the value of .
member.param: The inclusive lower bound of the the random numbers returned.
The exclusive upper bound of the random numbers returned. must be greater than or equal to .
The size of the generated collection.
Determines whether or not the returned collection will be randomly shuffled.
member.returns: A collection containing the random numbers.
member.exception: Thrown if either parameter value is less than zero, or if is less than . Also conditionally thrown, when is greater than , if the is less than one or is greater than the difference between and such that it will be impossible to generate a collection of the size of the specified value.
An error has occurred while generating the collection.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.Abstractions.IConcurrentRandomGenerator.Next(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the next random number based on the specified and values.
member.param: The inclusive lower bound of the random number returned.
The exclusive upper bound of the random number returned. must be greater than or equal to .
member.exception: Thrown if either parameter value is less than zero, or if is less than .
An error has occurred while generating the random number.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.Abstractions.IConcurrentRandomGenerator.Next
member.summary: Returns a non-negative random integer.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer that is greater than or equal to 0 and less than .
member.exception: An error has occurred while generating the random number.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.Abstractions.IConcurrentRandomGenerator.TakeRandom``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a specified number of random elements from a sequence.
member.param: The sequence to return elements from.
The number of elements to return.
Determines whether or not the returned sequence will be randomly shuffled.
member.returns: An that contains the specified number of elements randomly selected from the sequence.
member.exception: Thrown if is null.
Thrown if is less than one.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.ConcurrentRandomGenerator
member.summary: A thread-safe wrapper around the type for generating pseudo-random numbers.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Returns a non-negative random integer.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer that is greater than or equal to 0 and less than .
member.exception: An error has occurred while generating the random number.

The exclusive upper bound of the random number returned. must be greater than or equal to .
member.exception: Thrown if either parameter value is less than zero, or if is less than .
An error has occurred while generating the random number.

member.summary: Generates a unique collection of integers based on the specified and values with a size specified by the value of .
member.param: The inclusive lower bound of the the random numbers returned.
The exclusive upper bound of the random numbers returned. must be greater than or equal to .
The size of the generated collection.
Determines whether or not the returned collection will be randomly shuffled.
member.returns: A collection containing the random numbers.
member.exception: Thrown if either parameter value is less than zero, or if is less than . Also conditionally thrown, when is greater than , if the is less than one or is greater than the difference between and such that it will be impossible to generate a collection of the size of the specified value.
An error has occurred while generating the collection.

member.summary: Returns a specified number of random elements from a sequence.
member.param: The sequence to return elements from.
The number of elements to return.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.ConcurrentRandomGenerator.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases unmanaged and - optionally - managed resources.
member.param: true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Umbrella.Utilities.Numerics.ConcurrentRandomGenerator.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Sorting.SortDirection
member.summary: Used to specify the sort direction for a list of items. This exists to avoid using the SortDirection enum from the System.Web namespaces which isn't available in .NET Core.

member.name: F:Umbrella.Utilities.Sorting.SortDirection.Ascending
member.summary: Sort in ascending order.

member.name: F:Umbrella.Utilities.Sorting.SortDirection.Descending
member.summary: Sort in descending order.

member.name: T:Umbrella.Utilities.Sorting.SortExpressionDescriptor
member.summary: Used to describe a sorting rule. One intended usage of this is for when an API controller receives data from a client about how data should be sorted and a JSON representation of this is deserialized to an instance of this type. The web projects contain model binders for performing custom JSON deserialization to this type.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Sorting.SortExpressionDescriptor.MemberName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the member.

member.name: P:Umbrella.Utilities.Sorting.SortExpressionDescriptor.Direction
member.summary: Gets or sets the .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerExtensions
member.summary: A set of extension methods for instances which provide more comprehensive logging functionality than the built-in method and the Log* extension methods provided by Microsoft.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods used to register services for the Umbrella.Utilities package with a specified dependency injection container builder.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollectionExtensions.AddUmbrellaUtilities(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{System.IServiceProvider,Umbrella.Utilities.Email.Options.EmailSenderOptions})
member.summary: Adds the Umbrella.Utilities services to the specified dependency injection container builder.
member.param: The services dependency injection container builder to which the services will be added.
member.returns: The dependency injection container builder.
member.exception: Thrown if the is null.

members.member:
Configures the for use with the .
The services dependency injection container builder to which the services will be added. The dependency injection container builder. An optional delegate used to build the . The dependency injection container builder. /// Thrown if the is null.
